zh.lifeSummary: 當Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro於大約1145年出生時，他的父親Orso Bobone Orsini10歲，母親Gaetana Caetani16歲。他於1175年與Stefania Rubia Orsini在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁布亞武爾希尼斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1237年在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年93歲，埋葬在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro于大约1145年出生时，他的父亲Orso Bobone Orsini10岁，母亲Gaetana Caetani16岁。他于1175年与Stefania Rubia Orsini在意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁布亞武爾希尼斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1237年在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年93岁，埋葬在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

en.lifeSummary: When Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro was born about 1145, his father, Orso Bobone Orsini, was 10 and his mother, Gaetana Caetani, was 16. He married Stefania Rubia Orsini in 1175, in Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1237, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 93, and was buried in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro est né environ 1145, son père, Orso Bobone Orsini, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Gaetana Caetani, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Stefania Rubia Orsini en 1175, à Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1237, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie.

Lui sposato Stefania Rubia Orsini nel 1175, nel Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaroが約1145年に生まれた時，父Orso Bobone Orsiniは10歳，母Gaetana Caetaniは16歳であった。1175年にイタリアフリウリ ベンエズア ギウリアウディンブアウルシニスでStefania Rubia Orsiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1237年にイタリアラズオロマロマで93歳で死去し，イタリアラズオロマロマにて埋葬された。

ko.Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giu: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 버이아 르시니스

ko.lifeSummary: Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro(이)가 대략 1145년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Orso Bobone Orsini(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Gaetana Caetani(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1175년 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 버이아 르시니스에서 Stefania Rubia Orsini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에 묻혔다.

ru.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezi: магнано ин ривиира, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro родился около 1145 г., его отцу по имени Orso Bobone Orsini было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Gaetana Caetani, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Stefania Rubia Orsini в 1175 г. в местности урсинис, буя, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1237 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия.

es.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezi: Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro nació aproximadamente 1145, su papá, Orso Bobone Orsini, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Gaetana Caetani, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Stefania Rubia Orsini en 1175, en Ursinis, Buia, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1237, en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.
